name: Rokid Claude
summary: Voice client for controlling Claude Code from Rokid glasses with a live green HUD.
description: Rokid Claude lets you speak Claude Code tasks from Rokid glasses and watch progress stream back to a monochrome green HUD. It connects to a relay running on your Mac for local or remote coding sessions.
author: williamlzz

releases.notes:
First public release of Rokid Claude - voice-control Claude Code on your home Mac from Rokid Glasses, with progress streamed to a green HUD.

Download the APK below and sideload it onto Rokid Glasses or any Android phone (debug-signed). See README.md and docs/SETUP.md for local (USB) and remote (ngrok) setup.

listing.descriptionMarkdown:
## About
Rokid Claude turns Rokid glasses into a voice remote for Claude Code running on a Mac. The Android client captures spoken tasks, sends them to a local relay, and displays the agent's progress on a monochrome green heads-up display.

## Key features
- Voice prompts from Rokid glasses or another Android device
- Live Claude Code progress stream on the glasses HUD
- Gesture confirmation for risky tool calls
- Voice model switching between Opus, Sonnet, and Haiku
- Runtime language switching between English and Chinese
- QR provisioning for Wi-Fi and relay configuration
- USB, local network, or ngrok-based remote setup

## Requirements
- Rokid glasses, or another Android device for client testing
- A Mac running the Rokid Claude relay and Claude Code CLI
- Claude Code installed and authenticated on the Mac
- Node.js, whisper.cpp, and a local speech model for the relay
- Initial sideload/provisioning over USB before wireless use

## Notes
- The APK is debug-signed in the first public release.
- The relay can run commands on your Mac, so protect remote access tokens and expose it only with care.
- This is a hobby/developer workflow tool, not a standalone glasses assistant.
